name: zeus-herald
description: Reliable camera event notifications via Telegram Bot and ntfy (successor to upcam-client / SnapShotter)

scripts.test: node scripts/check-banned-stack.mjs && node --test test/smoke.test.js test/config.test.js test/notifiers.test.js test/banned-stack.test.js
scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js src/config.js src/logger.js src/notifiers/base.js src/notifiers/telegram.js src/notifiers/ntfy.js src/notifiers/hub.js src/notifiers/index.js

author: zeus-herald contributors
